name: stubborn_buddies_msgs
description: Messages to support library of stubborn buddies

Heartbeat.description: Heartbeat message that supports additional checkpoint information for
Heartbeat.raw:
# Heartbeat message that supports additional checkpoint information for
# control flow monitoring on the receiver side.

# Two-integer timestamp that is expressed as seconds and nanoseconds.
builtin_interfaces/Time stamp

# The unique identifier of the active checkpoint.
uint16 checkpoint_id 0

Status.description: Status message for publishing lease expiry information of the watched entity.
Status.raw:
# Status message for publishing lease expiry information of the watched entity.

# Two-integer timestamp that is expressed as seconds and nanoseconds.
builtin_interfaces/Time stamp

# The unique identifier of the active checkpoint.
uint16 missed_number 0
